title: helianthemum italicum var. obovatum
intro: Helianthemum italicum var. obovatum, also known as Rockrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It is native to Italy and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Rockrose often involve infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used as a topical treatment or ingested as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
